name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- ManageUI SetGraphic now applies and verifies TextMeshProUGUI text, font size, font asset, alignment, rich text, auto-sizing, overflow, color, and raycast settings.
- Unicode TMP strings are preserved when editing and saving Prefab Stage contents.
- SetGraphic marks Prefab Stage contents dirty and returns full text/TMP before/after state.
- Empty or unsupported SetGraphic updates return explicit no-change/error diagnostics instead of silent success.
- MCP smoke regression saves and rereads TMP Unicode text and font sizes from prefab YAML.

### Previous Changes

- ManageUI creation actions resolve explicit parents inside the current Prefab Stage and create objects in the stage scene.
- Missing or ambiguous UI parents fail without silently creating root objects in an ordinary scene.
- RuntimeStateProbe Assertions has the correct array-of-objects MCP schema with tolerant single-object normalization.
- WorkSession semantic review detects stale/noisy scene baselines and returns a compact skipped status.
